name: Winter Vegetable Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from kale and wash; pat dry on paper towels. Set aside.
2. Remove roots, tough outer leaves, and tops from leeks. Split leeks in half lengthwise.
3. Place leeks in a small Dutch oven and cook, covered, in a small amount of boiling water for about 5 minutes, or until tender. Remove with a slotted spoon; cut into julienne strips and set aside. Return liquid to a boil; add carrots. Cover and cook for 1 minute; remove with a slotted spoon.
4. Add kale, cover, and cook for 1 minute. Drain.
5. Line a serving platter with cooked kale.
6. Arrange leeks and carrots in individual servings on top of the kale.
7. Combine green onions, yogurt, garlic, salt, pepper, and vinegar in a small bowl. Stir well. Cover and chill.
8. Serve yogurt over salad.
